object_a.label: other
object_a.description: Wooden newel post and handrail with turned white spindles
object_a.long_form_open_description: Glossy stained wooden handrail and prominent newel/post at the base of the staircase. The top rail is medium brown wood with a rounded profile; the newel shows carved or turned detailing. The handrail is mounted over a row of white turned balusters.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs along the right side of the stairs; newel sits on the landing adjacent to the first few stair treads
object_a.object_text_short: Wooden newel post and handrail with turned white spindles
object_a.object_text_long: right sector | Glossy stained wooden handrail and prominent newel/post at the base of the staircase. The top rail is medium brown wood with a rounded profile; the newel shows carved or turned detailing. The handrail is mounted over a row of white turned balusters.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_short: Wooden newel post and handrail with turned white spindles
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: right sector | Glossy stained wooden handrail and prominent newel/post at the base of the staircase. The top rail is medium brown wood with a rounded profile; the newel shows carved or turned detailing. The handrail is mounted over a row of white turned balusters.

object_b.label: lamp
object_b.description: wall-mounted light switch panel on right wall (controls lighting)
object_b.long_form_open_description: Standard rectangular light switch/thermostat style panel mounted on the right-side interior wall at typical switch height (~1.2 m from floor). White or light-colored plate contrasting with beige wall.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the right wall near the glass door; in front of the sofa area
